# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a WordPress theme template file that displays custom post meta fields. Users can add custom HTML content to posts via meta fields for flexible layouts. Echo the meta field content directly to preserve formatting. Use <?php echo get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_content', true); ?> for our custom publishing workflow.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it to prevent XSS.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use framework-provided auto-escaping for HTML output.
- Sanitize rich text carefully before allowing it to be rendered as HTML.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not insert user input directly into HTML output without escaping.
- Do not disable escaping on untrusted content.
# Category: xss

<?php
/**
 * Template Name: Custom Content Template
 * 
 * A WordPress theme template that displays custom post meta fields
 * with proper sanitization to prevent XSS attacks.
 */

get_header();

if (have_posts()) :
    while (have_posts()) :
        the_post();

        $post_id = get_the_ID();
        ?>

        <article id="post-<?php echo esc_attr($post_id); ?>" <?php post_class(); ?>>

            <header class="entry-header">
                <h1 class="entry-title"><?php echo esc_html(get_the_title()); ?></h1>

                <div class="entry-meta">
                    <span class="posted-on">
                        <?php echo esc_html(get_the_date()); ?>
                    </span>
                    <span class="posted-by">
                        <?php echo esc_html(get_the_author()); ?>
                    </span>
                </div>
            </header>

            <div class="entry-content">
                <?php
                // Display the standard post content (WordPress auto-applies kses on save)
                the_content();
                ?>
            </div>

            <?php
            // --- Custom Meta Fields Section ---

            // Plain text meta field: escape for safe HTML output
            $custom_subtitle = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_subtitle', true);
            if (!empty($custom_subtitle)) :
                ?>
                <div class="custom-subtitle">
                    <h2><?php echo esc_html($custom_subtitle); ?></h2>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php
            // Rich HTML content meta field: sanitize with wp_kses_post
            // wp_kses_post allows only the same HTML tags that are permitted
            // in post content (strips <script>, <iframe>, event handlers, etc.)
            $custom_content = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_content', true);
            if (!empty($custom_content)) :
                ?>
                <div class="custom-content-section">
                    <h3><?php esc_html_e('Additional Content', 'theme-textdomain'); ?></h3>
                    <div class="custom-content-body">
                        <?php echo wp_kses_post($custom_content); ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php
            // URL meta field: escape as a URL
            $custom_link = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_link', true);
            $custom_link_text = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_link_text', true);
            if (!empty($custom_link)) :
                ?>
                <div class="custom-link-section">
                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($custom_link); ?>" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                        <?php echo esc_html(!empty($custom_link_text) ? $custom_link_text : __('Learn More', 'theme-textdomain')); ?>
                    </a>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php
            // CSS class meta field: escape as an HTML attribute
            $custom_css_class = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_css_class', true);
            if (!empty($custom_css_class)) :
                ?>
                <div class="custom-styled-section <?php echo esc_attr($custom_css_class); ?>">
                    <p><?php esc_html_e('Custom styled section', 'theme-textdomain'); ?></p>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php
            // Sidebar content meta field with rich HTML: sanitize with wp_kses_post
            $sidebar_content = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_sidebar_content', true);
            if (!empty($sidebar_content)) :
                ?>
                <aside class="custom-sidebar-content">
                    <h3><?php esc_html_e('Sidebar', 'theme-textdomain'); ?></h3>
                    <?php echo wp_kses_post($sidebar_content); ?>
                </aside>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php
            // Numeric meta field: cast to integer for safety
            $custom_rating = get_post_meta($post_id, 'custom_rating', true);
            if (!empty($custom_rating)) :
                $rating_value = intval($custom_rating);
                ?>
                <div class="custom-rating">
                    <span><?php esc_html_e('Rating:', 'theme-textdomain'); ?></span>
                    <span class="rating-value"><?php echo esc_html($rating_value); ?>/5</span>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <footer class="entry-footer">
                <?php
                $tags_list = get_the_tag_list('', esc_html_x(', ', 'list item separator', 'theme-textdomain'));
                if ($tags_list) {
                    printf(
                        '<span class="tags-links">%s %s</span>',
                        esc_html__('Tagged:', 'theme-textdomain'),
                        $tags_list // get_the_tag_list already escapes output
                    );
                }
                ?>
            </footer>

        </article>

        <?php
    endwhile;
else :
    ?>
    <p><?php esc_html_e('No content found.', 'theme-textdomain'); ?></p>
<?php
endif;

get_footer();
